plot outline: Five long-time friends are invited to the Greek island home of billionaire Miles Bron. All five know Bron from way back and owe their current wealth, fame and careers to him. The main event is a murder weekend game with Bron to be the victim. In reality, they all have reasons to kill him. Also invited is Benoit Blanc, the world's greatest detective.
title: Glass Onion
akas: Glass Onion: A Knives Out Mystery (United States)
Glass Onion: A Knives Out Mystery (Philippines, English title)
Glass Onion: A Knives Out Mystery (Thailand, English title)
Glass Onion: A Knives Out Mystery (Ireland, English title)
